firecrawl.markdown:
Más lugares de interés

Basílica del Gran Poder
=======================

El escultor Juan de Mesa esculpió en 1620 este magnífico Nazareno, el Cristo del Gran Poder, el cual procesiona la madrugada del Viernes Santo y que tantos devotos tiene.

Basílica del Gran Poder
-----------------------

El templo se construyó entre 1960 y 1965, de corte historicista.

El gran salón del tesoro de bienes artísticos de la Hermandad muestra los dos pasos montados, tanto el del Señor como el de la Santísima Virgen. Junto a ellos, en una serie de vitrinas adosadas a los muros, se presentan el resto de elementos del ajuar de las imágenes y las insignias del cortejo de la cofradía.

#### Ficha

[gran-poder.es](http://gran-poder.es/)

954915686

Plaza de San Lorenzo, 13

[Ver mapa](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Bas%C3%ADlica+de+Jes%C3%BAs+del+Gran+Poder/@37.3972134,-5.9983535,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m5!3m4!1s0xd126c092467627f:0x7c3dbc8ebcebe4c3!8m2!3d37.3972092!4d-5.9961648)

Basilica.hasAcknowledgement: The sculptor Juan de Mesa carved this magnificent Nazarene, the Christ of Great Power, in 1620.

hasAdditionalInformation.accessTip: What you need to know is in your email.
hasAdditionalInformation.curiosities: The temple was built between 1960 and 1965, in a historicist style.

frequentlyAskedQuestion.question: When does the Christ of Great Power process?
frequentlyAskedQuestion.answer: The Christ of Great Power processes in the early morning of Good Friday.

hasAdditionalInformation.remarks: The great hall of the artistic treasure of the Brotherhood displays the two mounted steps.

frequentlyAskedQuestion.question: Where is the Basilica of Great Power located?

hasDescription.longDescription: The temple was built between 1960 and 1965, in a historicist style. The great hall of the artistic treasure of the Brotherhood displays the two mounted steps.
